articles.title: Shakib on Bangladesh's T20 World Cup pull-out: 'A blunder from the government side'
articles.description: "It was a great miss as far as Bangladesh cricket is concerned"

articles.title: Devine and Tahuhu announce international sign-off after T20 World Cup
articles.description: Nensi Patel, Izzy Sharp, Bree Illing, Flora Devonshire and Polly Inglis will play their first T20 World Cups

articles.title: SLC president Shammi Silva, executive committee members resign
articles.description: The Sri Lankan government is now likely to appoint an interim committee, which is expected to have former cricketers Sidath Wettimuny and Roshan Mahanama in it

articles.title: Former quick Geoff Allott named New Zealand Cricket chief executive
articles.description: Allott played 10 Tests and 31 ODIs for New Zealand but has also served as NZC's general manager of cricket and an NZC board director, taking over after the resignation of Scott Weenink

articles.title: Wolvaardt, Mlaba complete comprehensive 4-1 series win for South Africa
articles.description: Wolvaardt's 92* took the hosts to 155 and India never got going in the chase

articles.title: Former Zimbabwe captain Mary-Anne Musonda retires from all forms of cricket
articles.description: She was part of the Zimbabwe setup since 2006 and was appointed captain in 2018

articles.title: Tanzid Hasan, Amite Hasan earn maiden call-ups to Bangladesh Test squad
articles.description: Bangladesh have also recalled Taskin Ahmed, while Khaled Ahmed and Jaker Ali are notable omissions

articles.title: 'Everything has to come to an end': Samit Patel bows out of English cricket after 24 years
articles.description: Spinning allrounder reflects on formidable career, as he targets future role as coach ... and maybe selector

articles.title: Sri Lanka Cricket chief Shammi Silva resigns along with executive committee
articles.description: Shammi Silva first assumed the presidency in February 2019.
